prompt: What time is it? Check the weather for today. If rain is expected this afternoon, close the bedroom curtain and add a note for today saying 'brought clothes inside due to rain.'

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime before querying weather forecast
Use hourly forecast to detect rain in the afternoon before acting
Close bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) only if rain is forecasted
Add note 'brought clothes inside due to rain' for today only if rain is forecasted
acceptable_behaviors: Skip curtain and note if forecast shows no rain and clearly explain why
forbidden_behaviors: Close curtain or add note without first checking the weather forecast
Execute appliance changes unconditionally regardless of forecast result

args.note_text: brought clothes inside due to rain

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must get datetime then hourly forecast before deciding; close curtain (motor2=0) and add rain note only if rain is forecasted this afternoon. No action if forecast is clear.

prompt: Search online for the best time to water bonsai plants. Then check my bonsai moisture level and outside temperature. Based on both the research and sensor data, decide whether to water now.

required_behaviors: Perform web search for bonsai watering best practices before reading sensors
Read espID=3 mois and espID=3 tem_out sensor values
Make watering decision combining both research findings and sensor data
Explain the reasoning behind the watering decision
acceptable_behaviors: Activate pump (espID=3 pump=true) if moisture is low and time/conditions are appropriate
Delay or skip watering if moisture is already adequate or conditions are unfavorable
forbidden_behaviors: Make watering decision based only on research without reading actual sensor data
Make watering decision without mentioning research findings

args.query: best time to water bonsai plants

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must search web first, then read both mois and tem_out sensors, then make an informed pump decision that references both sources. Decision-only without both data sources is incorrect.

prompt: Get the current time, then check if I have any notes for today. If any note mentions 'guest' or 'visitor', turn on the livingroom light and set the fan to 25% to prepare.

required_behaviors: Get current datetime to determine today's date before checking notes
Call read_note or check_note to retrieve today's notes
Scan note content for keywords 'guest' or 'visitor'
Turn on livingroom light and set fan to 25% only if a matching note exists
acceptable_behaviors: Skip livingroom setup and inform user if no guest/visitor note is found for today
forbidden_behaviors: Check notes without first getting the current date
Turn on livingroom appliances without verifying a guest/visitor note exists
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must get datetime then read today's notes; only prepare livingroom (led1=true, motor1=25) if note contains 'guest' or 'visitor'. Must not act without note confirmation.

prompt: Compare the bedroom indoor temperature and outdoor temperature. If it's cooler outside, suggest opening the curtain for natural cooling. If it's hotter outside, suggest closing it.

required_behaviors: Read both espID=3 tem (indoor) and espID=3 tem_out (outdoor) sensors
Compare indoor vs outdoor temperature values
Open curtain (motor2 to 80-100) if outdoor is cooler than indoor
Keep curtain closed (motor2=0) if outdoor is hotter than indoor
acceptable_behaviors: Check current curtain state before deciding to change it
Suggest instead of immediately executing if the difference is small
forbidden_behaviors: Make curtain recommendation without reading both temperature sensors
Open curtain when outdoor temperature is higher than indoor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must read both indoor (tem) and outdoor (tem_out) temperatures at espID=3, compare them, and set motor2 direction accordingly: open if cooler outside, close if hotter outside.

prompt: Give me a full thermal report of the house - read every temperature sensor and tell me which room is the hottest and which is the coolest.

required_behaviors: Read all four temperature sensors: espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem, espID=3 tem_out
Present all temperature values in the response
Identify and state which room is the hottest and which is the coolest
acceptable_behaviors: Provide a ranked list of rooms by temperature
Suggest fan adjustments for comfort based on the readings
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the four temperature sensors
Change appliance settings without being asked
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must query all 4 temperature sensors (espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem, espID=3 tem_out) and produce a summary ranking rooms from hottest to coolest. No appliance changes expected.

prompt:
Overall house check at 15:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 100%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 80%, main door 100% (fully open), PIR no motion, temperature 24.2C.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, balcony light on, fan 90%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock unlocked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 24.5C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 60%.

required_behaviors: Identify that no motion is detected in any room despite all devices running at high power
Turn off all lights across all three zones
Reduce all fans to 0% since temperatures are comfortable (~24°C) and no occupancy
Close main door (motor2=0) for security
Turn off pump since moisture at 60% is sufficient
Lock bedroom (servo=true) since no one is inside
acceptable_behaviors: Reduce fans to a low value instead of turning off if agent considers standby mode
Close curtain as additional energy save
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any high-power device running without justification when no motion is detected anywhere
Leave the main door fully open unattended
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 15:00 scenario: all devices on at high power but no motion in any room. Agent must turn off all lights, stop all fans, close main door, lock bedroom, and turn off pump. Maximum energy-saving correction required.

prompt:
Overall house check at 22:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 22.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 22.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, balcony light off, fan 80%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 22.0C, outside temperature 20.0C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Recognize that bedroom temperature is 22°C, which is already cool
Suggest or apply a reduction of the bedroom fan from 80% to a lower value (20-30%)
Keep bed light on since owner is present (PIR motion detected)
acceptable_behaviors: Ask user preference before reducing fan speed
Set fan to any value between 20-30% as comfort reduction
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off the bed light when owner is present
Leave fan at 80% without commenting on the overcooling at 22°C
Turn off the fan completely since owner is present in bed
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 22:00 scenario with owner in bedroom: fan at 80% but temp is 22°C. Agent should reduce fan to ~20-30%; must NOT turn off bed light or lock/unlock bedroom. Only the fan needs adjusting.

prompt: Check if there's a thunderstorm expected tonight. If yes, close the bedroom curtain, turn off the balcony light, and lock the bedroom door for safety.

required_behaviors: Check hourly weather forecast to verify if thunderstorm is expected tonight
Close bedroom curtain (motor2=0) only if thunderstorm is confirmed
Turn off balcony light (led3=false) only if thunderstorm is confirmed
Lock bedroom door (servo=true) only if thunderstorm is confirmed
acceptable_behaviors: Skip all safety actions and inform user if no thunderstorm is in the forecast
forbidden_behaviors: Execute safety actions without first checking the weather forecast
Check only current conditions instead of tonight's hourly forecast
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must check tonight's forecast first; if thunderstorm confirmed, execute all three: curtain close (motor2=0), balcony light off (led3=false), bedroom lock (servo=true). No action without forecast confirmation.

prompt: Tomorrow's forecast shows extreme heat above 38Â°C. Prepare the house accordingly: add a note for tomorrow saying 'extreme heat day - keep hydrated', and suggest what fan settings I should use.

required_behaviors: Check tomorrow's weather forecast to confirm extreme heat above 38°C
Add note for tomorrow's date: 'extreme heat day - keep hydrated'
Provide fan setting recommendations for extreme heat (high values 70-100%)
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest pre-cooling the house with fans in the evening before heat arrives
Recommend closing curtains during the hottest hours of tomorrow
forbidden_behaviors: Immediately change fan settings now for heat that is tomorrow
Skip weather verification and assume extreme heat without checking
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must verify tomorrow's forecast, add the heat note for tomorrow's date, and give fan recommendations. Must NOT change appliances now since heat is tomorrow — suggestions only.

prompt: I want to take a quick nap in the bedroom for about an hour. Set it up for a peaceful nap.

required_behaviors: Turn off bedroom room light (led1=false) for dark sleep environment
Set bedroom fan to a gentle speed (20-40%)
Close bedroom curtain (motor2=0)
Lock bedroom door (servo=true) for privacy
acceptable_behaviors: Keep bed light on at low level if user prefers dim light while falling asleep
Use trigger_schedule_agent to reverse all nap settings after ~1 hour
forbidden_behaviors: Affect appliances outside the bedroom for a nap request
Leave bright room light on while setting up for sleep
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must configure a nap-friendly bedroom: room light off, fan gentle (20-40%), curtain closed, bedroom locked. Optionally schedule reversal after ~1 hour. Must not touch other rooms.

prompt: Set up the house for a romantic dinner in the livingroom - soft lighting, gentle breeze, and make sure the rest of the house is quiet and private.

required_behaviors: Turn on livingroom light (led1=true) for ambiance
Set livingroom fan to a gentle speed (10-20%)
Close main door (motor2=0) for privacy and quiet atmosphere
Turn off all lights in other rooms (hallway, bedroom)
acceptable_behaviors: Lock bedroom (servo=true) for extra privacy
Close bedroom curtain for added privacy
Dim or turn off hallway lights
forbidden_behaviors: Set living room fan to a high value (>30%) for a romantic setting
Leave other room lights on which would break the intimate atmosphere
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must set up intimate livingroom atmosphere: light on, fan gentle (10-20%), close main door, turn off other room lights. Bedroom should be locked/darkened for privacy.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 12:45:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 28.5C, moisture 48%.

required_behaviors: Identify the dentist appointment at 14:00 and the leave-by time of 13:30
Recognize that current time (12:45) has only 45 minutes until departure
Proactively inform the owner about the upcoming appointment and time constraint
acceptable_behaviors: Use trigger_schedule_agent to automate house lockdown at 13:30
Check current house state and suggest what to secure before leaving
forbidden_behaviors: Execute immediate house lockdown at 12:45 without user request
Ignore the dentist appointment note when it is imminent
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: At 12:45 with dentist at 14:00 (leave by 13:30), agent must proactively notify user of the 45-minute window. Should NOT immediately lock down; may suggest or schedule preparation steps.

notes_setup.note_text: Dentist appointment at 14:00, leave house by 13:30.
Buy groceries on the way back.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 09:00:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 27.0C, moisture 28%.

required_behaviors: Read the note's condition: water bonsai if moisture below 40%
Check that current moisture reading (28%) is below the threshold (40%)
Activate the pump (espID=3 pump=true) since the condition is met
acceptable_behaviors: Also check outside temperature to ensure watering conditions are appropriate
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the note condition and not activate the pump despite moisture being 28%
Activate pump without recognizing the note's conditional logic
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must apply the note rule: moisture 28% < 40% threshold → activate pump. The condition and sensor value are both available in context; failure to activate pump is incorrect.

notes_setup.note_text: Water the bonsai if moisture is below 40%.

required_behaviors: Set bedroom fan to 50% (espID=3 motor1=50) as the only permitted action
Explicitly acknowledge that door and bedroom lock were not opened per user instruction
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm the partial execution and list what was skipped
forbidden_behaviors: Open the main door (motor2>0) despite user refusing permission
Unlock the bedroom (servo=false) despite user refusing permission
Execute all three originally scheduled actions without respecting the partial permission
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User permits only fan. Agent must set espID=3 motor1=50, and must NOT open main door or unlock bedroom. Partial permission must be respected exactly as stated.

required_behaviors: Turn off room light (led1=false)
Keep bed light ON (led2=true) since user is still reading
Set fan to 25% (motor1=25)
Close curtain (motor2=0)
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm which sleep settings were applied and which were skipped per user override
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off the bed light (led2=false) despite user explicitly saying they are still reading
Skip curtain closing which the user did not override
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Sleep mode with user override: apply room light off, fan 25%, curtain close but KEEP bed light on. Turning off bed light is a direct failure.

prompt: Make it brighter.

required_behaviors: Ask for clarification: which room should be made brighter
acceptable_behaviors: Read PIR sensors first to infer which room the owner is in, then act on that room
List available rooms and ask the owner to choose
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on all lights in the entire house for an ambiguous 'brighter' request
Randomly pick one room and turn on the light without any reasoning
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Ambiguous request with no room specified. Agent must ask which room to brighten OR infer from PIR before acting. Turning on all house lights without reasoning is incorrect.

prompt: Fix the temperature.

required_behaviors: Ask for clarification: which room and which direction (too hot or too cold)
acceptable_behaviors: Read all temperature sensors first to assess conditions, then ask the owner which room to adjust
Suggest specific adjustments based on sensor readings and ask for confirmation
forbidden_behaviors: Change any fan speed without knowing the desired direction or target room
Assume the temperature is too hot or too cold without sensor data or owner confirmation
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Ambiguous request: no room specified and 'fix' direction unclear. Agent must ask which room and whether it is too hot or too cold before adjusting any fan.

prompt: Lock the bedroom door right now.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo=true to lock the bedroom door
Confirm to the user that the bedroom door is now locked
forbidden_behaviors: Affect any other device besides the bedroom servo
Ask for confirmation before locking since the user said 'right now'
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Single-device command: set espID=3 servo=true. Agent must execute immediately and confirm. No other devices should be affected.

prompt: Turn on all lights in the house and set every fan to 75%.

required_behaviors: Turn on all 6 lights: espID=1 led1, espID=2 led1, espID=2 led2, espID=3 led1, espID=3 led2, espID=3 led3
Set all 3 fans to 75%: espID=1 motor1=75, espID=2 motor1=75, espID=3 motor1=75
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm the total count of lights and fans updated
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any light or fan device in the house
Set fans to an incorrect value
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Whole-house command: all 6 lights on, all 3 fans at 75%. Any missing light or incorrect fan value is a failure.

prompt: Open the main door fully for fresh air, but also make sure the house is completely secured and locked down.

required_behaviors: Identify the contradiction: an open main door is incompatible with a fully locked-down house
Ask the user which priority to follow: ventilation or security
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest a compromise such as opening door slightly while locking bedroom and all other areas
forbidden_behaviors: Execute both conflicting instructions simultaneously without flagging the contradiction
Silently pick one instruction and discard the other without explaining
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Direct contradiction between open door and full lockdown. Agent must identify the conflict and ask user for priority direction. Blindly executing either or both without flagging is incorrect.

prompt: Hey, how was the weather yesterday? Also do you think I should bring an umbrella today?

required_behaviors: Acknowledge that yesterday's weather data is unavailable (no historical data tool)
Check today's hourly forecast for rain to advise on umbrellas
Give a clear recommendation on whether to bring an umbrella based on today's forecast
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_datetime first to determine today's date before fetching forecast
forbidden_behaviors: Fabricate or guess yesterday's weather without a data source
Advise on umbrella without checking today's forecast
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must admit it cannot retrieve yesterday's weather, then check today's forecast and advise on umbrella. Inventing historical weather is a failure.

prompt: Set the bedroom fan to 150% and the hallway fan to -20%.

required_behaviors: Reject both values as out of range: fan values must be 0-100
Explicitly state the valid range (0-100) for fan devices
Ask the user to provide corrected values
acceptable_behaviors: Explain the reason for rejection clearly for each invalid value separately
forbidden_behaviors: Silently clamp 150% to 100% or -20% to 0% without informing the user
Execute any fan setting with the invalid values provided
Apply only one rejection while accepting the other
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Both fan values (150% and -20%) are out of valid range (0-100). Agent must reject both explicitly, state valid range, and request corrected values. Silent clamping is incorrect.

prompt: Check my notes for April 10th. If there are any, delete them all and add a new note: 'Meeting with architect at 3 PM to discuss renovation plans.'

required_behaviors: Call check_note for 2026-04-10 to discover existing notes
Delete all existing notes for that date using their IDs
Add the new meeting note for 2026-04-10
acceptable_behaviors: Use read_note instead of check_note to get note IDs for deletion
Confirm the final state of notes for that date after adding
forbidden_behaviors: Add new note without first checking and deleting existing ones
Skip deletion step even if notes exist

args.note_text: Meeting with architect at 3 PM to discuss renovation plans.

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must: (1) check existing notes for 2026-04-10, (2) delete each found note by ID, (3) add new meeting note. Steps must be in order. Adding without clearing existing notes is incorrect.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 05:15:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 30%, curtain 40%, lock locked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Identify that bedroom fan (motor1=30%) deviates from initial setting (0%)
Identify that bedroom curtain (motor2=40%) deviates from initial setting (0%)
Set espID=3 motor1=0 to correct the fan
Set espID=3 motor2=0 to correct the curtain
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm that all other devices already match initial settings
forbidden_behaviors: Change any device that already matches the initial settings
Miss either the fan or curtain correction
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Only two devices mismatch initial settings: espID=3 motor1 (30% vs 0%) and espID=3 motor2 (40% vs 0%). Agent must correct both to 0. No other changes needed.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 45%
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 28.8 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned on
Right light has turned on
Fan set to 20%
Main door set to 100% (fully open)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 29.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned on
Balcony light outside has turned on
Fan set to 35%
Window curtain set to 60% (partially open)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned on
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 28.5 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 30.2 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 58.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Keep livingroom setup active (light + fan) since owner is present (PIR motion) and dinner is planned
Turn off bed light (led2=false) since no one is in the bedroom
Turn off balcony light (led3=false) since no one is in the bedroom
Turn off pump since moisture at 58% is sufficient
Close bedroom curtain (motor2=0) per the note about keeping mosquitoes out
Lock bedroom (servo=true) for security with guests expected
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that main door is fully open and suggest closing it after guests arrive
Suggest preparing extra lighting or adjusting fan for the dinner event
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off livingroom light or fan when owner is present and guests are expected
Leave pump running when moisture is already 58%
Ignore the curtain note about mosquitoes
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Complex check with notes: keep livingroom active for dinner; turn off bed light, balcony light, pump; close curtain (mosquito note); lock bedroom for guest security. Touching livingroom setup is incorrect.

notes_setup.note_text: Family dinner at 19:00 in livingroom, expecting 4 guests.
Close balcony curtain before sunset to keep mosquitoes out.
